title: The Little Needle Always Knows The North,
content:
The little needle always knows the North,
    The little bird remembereth his note,
    And this wise Seer within me never errs.
    I never taught it what it teaches me;
    I only follow, when I act aright.

    October 9, 1832.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Ralph Waldo Emerson, titled "The Little Needle Always Knows The North,", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
